title: RequiredResourceAccess
description: Specifies the set of OAuth 2.0 permission scopes and app roles under a specified resource that an application requires access to

resourceAppId.description: The unique identifier for the resource that the application requires access to (the appId of the target application)

resourceAccess.description: The list of OAuth 2.0 permission scopes and app roles required from the specified resource

id.description: Unique identifier for the app role or OAuth 2.0 permission scope

type.description: Specifies whether the id property references a Scope (delegated permission) or a Role (application permission)
